    Method
    Description
    @NotNull GoalKey<T>
    Goal.getKey()
    A unique key that identifies this type of goal.
    static <A extends Mob>
    @NotNull GoalKey<A>
    GoalKey.of​(@NotNull Class<A> entityClass, @NotNull NamespacedKey namespacedKey)

    Description

    @Nullable Goal<T>
    MobGoals.getGoal​(T mob, @NotNull GoalKey<T> key)

    MobGoals.getGoals​(T mob, @NotNull GoalKey<T> key)
